LAW AND MOTION 301, RENEWED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. OPPOSING PARTY APPEARED. NO OTHER APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT'S TENTATIVE RULING WAS "HEARING REQUIRED". THEREFORE, THE COURT DENIED PETITIONER KENNETH K. ROBIN'S RENEWED PETITION FOR WRIT OF MANDATE. THE ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD PREVIOUSLY LODGED WITH THE COURT WAS WITHDRAWN BY RESPONDENT. ORDER SIGNED IN CHAMBERS. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855

No other appearance on this matter. The Court's tentative ruling was "hearing required". Therefore, The Court denied Petitioner Kenneth K. Robin's renewed petition for writ of Mandate.
